command:
echo "=== REMY SOUL.MD SEARCH ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "find /home/jose -name 'SOUL*' -o -name 'soul*' -o -name 'personality*' 2>/dev/null | head -10"

echo "=== REMY OPENCLAW CONFIG ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "cat /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('name:', d.get('name')); print('telegram:', d.get('telegram',{})); print('identity:', str(d.get('identity',''))[:300])\" 2>/dev/null"

echo "=== REMY TELEGRAM BOT ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "env | grep -i 'telegram\|TELEGRAM\|BOT_TOKEN' 2>/dev/null; cat /home/jose/.openclaw/gateway.systemd.env 2>/dev/null"

echo "=== REMY SERVICE FILE ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "systemctl cat openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null | head -40"

echo "=== CLOUDFLARE CONFIG ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 \
  "cloudflared tunnel list 2>/dev/null; cat ~/.cloudflared/*.yml 2>/dev/null | head -40"
